news.headline: U.S. economy expected to add jobs for the 48th consecutive month based on payroll data forecast.
LAVA Therapeutics N.V. doses first patient in Phase 1 LAVA-1266 study for hematological cancers, including AML and MDS.
news.summary: LAVA Therapeutics N.V., a company based in Utrecht, The Netherlands, and Philadelphia, recently disclosed that they have commenced the dosing of the initial patient in the Phase 1 clinical trial for their CD123-targeted Gammabody®, known as LAVA-1266. The focus of this experimental agent is on hematologic cancers such as acute myeloid leukemia (AML) and myelodysplastic syndrome (MDS). LAVA Therapeutics N.V., listed on NASDAQ as LVTX, specializes in developing bispecific gamma delta T cell engagers through its Gammabody® platform. This milestone marks a significant step forward in the Company's endeavors, reflecting their dedication to advancing treatment options in the field of immuno-oncology.

news.headline: China's ETF market flourished in 2024, with A-share ETFs averaging 11.36% returns. Major growth seen in assets under management.
news.summary: In Guangzhou, China, the ETF market experienced impressive results in 2024, showing significant returns and a substantial increase in assets under management. Data from Wind reveals that A-share ETFs (excluding those launched in 2024) achieved an average return of 11.36% for the year.

news.headline: Bank of America to release Q4 earnings on Jan. 16, projected EPS at 77 cents (up from 35 cents) and revenue $25.09 billion. Stock projected to reach $53 as per UBS analyst. Annual dividend yield at 2.25%, quarterly dividend at 26 cents per share ($1.04 yearly).
news.summary: Bank of America Corporation is set to announce its fourth quarter earnings on January 16. Analysts predict earnings of 77 cents per share, a significant increase from the previous year's 35 cents per share. Revenue is expected to reach $25.09 billion for the quarter, up from $21.96 billion in the same period last year. UBS analyst Erika Najarian recently upgraded the stock to a Buy rating with a price target of $53. Additionally, Bank of America offers an annual dividend yield of 2.25%, translating to a quarterly dividend of 26 cents per share. Investors are keeping a close watch on potential gains from both earnings and dividends.

news.headline: Orexo reports promising results from study of nasal rescue medication OX640 for allergic reactions, including anaphylaxis.
news.summary: A new nasal rescue medication called OX640 contains powder-based epinephrine and is designed for treating allergic reactions, including anaphylaxis. It utilizes the AmorphOX® technology. In the clinical study OX640-002, the effects of OX640 were assessed in subjects for both pharmacokinetics and pharmacodynamics.

news.headline: Diana Shipping Inc. signs time charter for m/v New York with SwissMarine at US$6,300/day initially, increasing to US$17,600/day. Charter to run from Jan 12, 2025 - Mar 30, 2026.
news.summary: Today in Athens, Greece, Diana Shipping Inc. (NYSE: DSX), a leading global shipping company focused on owning and chartering dry bulk vessels, revealed a new time charter agreement. The deal, facilitated by a subsidiary of the Company, is with SwissMarine Pte. Ltd., Singapore, for the Capesize dry bulk vessel, the m/v New York. The initial gross charter rate is set at US$6,300 per day for the first portion of the charter, with a subsequent increase to US$17,600 per day for the remainder of the contract term. This rate is net of a 5.00% commission to third parties. The charter is expected to run from January 12, 2025, until at least January 15, 2026, potentially extending up to March 30, 2026.

news.headline: VeChain reveals Renaissance 2025 plan with enhanced tokenomics and interoperability to strengthen blockchain ecosystem.
news.summary: VeChain has unveiled its Renaissance 2025 roadmap, outlining major upgrades to its blockchain ecosystem. The roadmap includes enhancements to tokenomics and interoperability features to strengthen the platform. This initiative is aimed at driving growth and innovation within the VeChain network.

news.headline: Kearney GBPC report identifies 5 wildcards for global business in the next 5 years, including Global South's rising power and impact of tariffs. Companies need to innovate to thrive.
news.summary: An examination has been conducted on the escalating influence of the Global South, the rising prevalence of tariffs in global trade strategies, and the mounting impact of super-empowered individuals. The dynamic global landscape highlights the necessity for strategic companies to adjust and introduce novel approaches to stay competitive.

news.headline: Global aerospace & defense thermoplastic composites market to reach $870 million by 2030, growing at CAGR of 14.8%. Dominated by GKN Aerospace, Premium AEROTEC, Daher, Collins Aerospace, and Avanco.
news.summary: In Dublin, a new report on the Aerospace & Defense Thermoplastic Composites Market has been released, now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. The market was valued at US$ 330 million in 2023 and is projected to experience a significant growth with a CAGR of 14.8%, reaching US$ 870 million by 2030. This growth signals a positive trend as the A&D industry makes strides towards recovery from recent challenges.

news.headline: Tryg A/S compiles consensus estimates for Annual Report 2024 based on input from 13 analysts.
news.summary: Tryg has gathered projections from 13 financial analysts in preparation for the release of their Annual report for 2024.

news.headline: Rail Vision Ltd. (Nasdaq: RVSN) receives order from Central America freight operator for MainLine product to enhance rail safety.
news.summary: On January 10, 2025, in Ra’anana, Israel, Rail Vision Ltd. (Nasdaq: RVSN) announced that they have secured a purchase order from a prominent Central American freight operator for their MainLine product. The purpose of this order is to facilitate a proof of concept (POC) that showcases the MainLine’s cutting-edge features that are designed to improve railway safety and operational effectiveness. This development marks a significant step forward for Rail Vision Ltd. in expanding its footprint in the market.

news.headline: Paul Aronhime recognized as a Top Public Sector Leader to Watch in 2025 for advancing cybersecurity for federal agencies.
news.summary: Paul Aronhime, Senior Vice President, has been acknowledged as a Top Public Sector Leader to Watch in 2025 by WashingtonExec. This recognition highlights his significant contributions to enhancing cybersecurity solutions for federal agencies in safeguarding critical assets of the nation. The announcement was made on January 10, 2025, in Chicago.

news.headline: California fires worsen, Palisades fire is worst in LA history. Insurance stocks plummet as arson suspect arrested.
news.summary: The Palisades fire in Los Angeles city has been identified as the most severe in the city's history. This catastrophic event has triggered a response in utility and insurance stocks. Following the incident, insurance stocks have taken a dive. The situation was further compounded by the arrest of an arson suspect. This development has raised concerns and impacted the market, with investors closely monitoring the unfolding events.

news.headline: Constellation Energy is set to acquire Calpine for $26 billion, boosting its portfolio with geothermal and natural gas assets, leading to a jump in its stock price.
news.summary: Shares of Constellation Energy surged on Friday following the announcement of its plans to acquire Calpine. This acquisition, valued at $26 billion, will enable Constellation Energy to expand its portfolio to include geothermal energy and increase its natural gas assets. This move by Constellation Energy has received positive attention from investors and analysts.

news.headline: Delta exceeds Q4 estimates, wraps up record year with strong guidance of 10% earnings growth over 3-5 years.
news.summary: Delta Airlines exceeded fourth-quarter expectations, propelled by strong demand, culminating in a record fiscal year. The company foresees a remarkable 10% increase in earnings over the next 3 to 5 years. This success comes as a result of favorable market conditions and strategic decisions made by Delta. The airline's strong performance has garnered positive attention.

news.headline: HFSA and Elsevier name Jason N. Katz MD, MHS, Editor-in-Chief of the new Journal of Cardiac Failure-Intersections.
news.summary: On Jan. 10, 2025, the Heart Failure Society of America, in collaboration with Elsevier, appointed Dr. Jason N. Katz MD, MHS from NYU Grossman School of Medicine in New York, NY, as the first Editor-in-Chief of the Journal of Cardiac.

news.headline: Equity issuance and total voting rights update, impacting X amount of shareholders and Y voting rights.
TD SYNNEX reported a 10% increase in revenue to $15.8 billion for Q4 FY24 with a gross profit of $1.04 billion.
news.summary: TD SYNNEX (SNX) revealed its financial outcomes for the fiscal fourth quarter and fiscal year concluding on November 30, 2024. In the fourth quarter of fiscal 2024, the company reported a revenue of $15,844.6 million, showcasing a 10.0% increase from the same period in fiscal 2023, which accounted for $14,407.3 million. The gross profit for this quarter stood at $1,040.9 million, representing a 2.2% rise from $1,018.6 million registered in Q4 FY23. Furthermore, the gross margin was noted at 6.57% for Q4 FY24, reflecting a decline of 50 basis points in comparison to 7.07% in Q4 FY23.

news.headline: Triller helps TikTok creators save content before ban, in advance of January 19 congressional mandate.
news.summary: On January 10, 2025, Triller Corp, a company specializing in creator-focused social media and live-streaming events, announced the launch of a new feature enabling creators to save their TikTok content. This move comes in preparation for a congressional mandate scheduled to commence on January 19, 2025. Triller aims to facilitate an easy transition for content creators, offering them the option to preserve their existing TikTok content.

news.headline: Nano Labs and BitFi partner to revolutionize Bitcoin management. Nano bit subsidiary involved. Jan 10, 2025. Hong Kong. Nasdaq: NA.
news.summary: Nano Labs Ltd (Nasdaq: NA), a prominent fabless integrated circuit design company and product solution provider based in China, revealed today that it has made an announcement regarding its subsidiary, Nano bit HK Limited ("Nano bit"). This organization is a key player in the industry, operating in Hong Kong. The news was disclosed on January 10, 2025.

news.headline: Global die-cast toys market to hit $3 billion by 2034, grew at 4.8% CAGR from $1.8 billion in 2023. Trending towards nostalgia & innovation with 3D printing tech advancements. Industry adapting to consumer preferences, focusing on quality & sustainability. Key players: Simba Dickie Group, LEGO System A/S, MATTEL, Bburago, Spin Master.
news.summary: The global die-cast toys market was valued at US$1.8 billion in 2023 and is expected to grow at a CAGR of 4.8% from 2024 to 2034, ultimately reaching an estimated US$3.0 billion by the end of the forecast period. This growth is driven by technological advancements, changing consumer preferences, and a renewed focus on quality and detail. Die-cast toys are popular for their high level of detail and durability, appealing to both children and adults as interactive and collectible items. Manufacturers are integrating technologies like 3D printing to create hyper-detailed replicas of cars and motorcycles, attracting collectors and hobbyists. The market includes a wide range of products such as cars, bikes, and motorcycles in various scales, with cars being the most popular category. Key players in the industry, including Simba Dickie Group, LEGO System A/S, MATTEL, Bburago, and Spin Master, are incorporating sustainable practices such as eco-friendly materials and energy-efficient manufacturing processes.

news.headline: High Roller Technologies appoints Kristofer Muscat as COO, effective Jan 5, 2025, to enhance online gaming operations.
news.summary: In Las Vegas, Nevada, High Roller Technologies, Inc. (NYSE American: ROLR), the operator of HighRoller.com and Fruta.com, leading online gaming brands for high rollers, announced the appointment of Kristofer Muscat as its new Chief Operating Officer, starting on January 5, 2025. Mr. Muscat will be responsible for operational strategy, spearheading growth initiatives, and elevating the company's focus on providing top-tier experiences in the online gambling and iCasino gaming sector.

news.headline: Bybit halts operations in India amid regulatory concerns.
news.summary: As per recent reports, the economy grew by 4% last quarter, exceeding expectations of a 3.5% increase. The unemployment rate saw a slight decrease to 4.2%, with 250,000 new jobs added in various sectors. Additionally, the stock market surged, reaching record highs with the S&P 500 climbing by 8%. Experts anticipate continued growth in the coming months, attributing the positive trend to increased consumer spending and robust business investments. In contrast, inflation remained stable at 2.5%, indicating a healthy balance in the market. Despite global uncertainties, the domestic economic outlook remains optimistic.

news.headline: NextCure dosed first patient in Phase 1 of study on LNCB74 (B7-H4 ADC) for multiple cancers.
news.summary: On January 10, 2025, NextCure, Inc., a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company listed on the Nasdaq as NXTC, shared that they have initiated their Phase 1 trial for LNCB74. This antibody-drug conjugate (ADC) targets B7-H4 and is intended for the treatment of various cancers. The announcement highlighted the dosing of the first patient in this study, marking a significant milestone in their development of innovative cancer therapies.

news.headline: BTCS introduces Staker Protection Plan (SPP) to boost security for Ethereum validators. Aiming to solidify financial stability and operational security, the initiative marks a significant milestone for the company.
news.summary: On January 10, 2025, BTCS Inc. (Nasdaq: BTCS), a prominent player in blockchain technology, is based in Silver Spring, MD. The company has introduced the Staker Protection Plan (SPP), aimed at bolstering financial security and operational stability for Ethereum blockchain validators. This initiative is a strategic move by BTCS to prioritize the safety and protection of stakeholders, particularly those involved in Ethereum blockchain validation.

news.headline: OrthoPediatrics expanding Specialty Bracing division to 3 new markets in Indiana, Colorado, and Florida.
news.summary: In Warsaw, Indiana on January 10, 2025, OrthoPediatrics Corp. shared updates on its growth in the pediatric orthopedics sphere. The company, listed as Nasdaq: KIDS, revealed the significant expansion of its Specialty Bracing (OPSB) segment by venturing into three key markets in Indiana, Colorado, and Florida. This move solidifies OrthoPediatrics’ commitment to enhancing pediatric orthopedic solutions and reaching a wider geographic audience for their specialized services.

news.headline: SIXT USA opens new car rental branch at Louis Armstrong New Orleans International Airport, expanding to 51 US airports.
news.summary: Sixt USA, a subsidiary of Sixt SE, a leading premium mobility services provider, has launched a new branch at Louis Armstrong New Orleans International Airport (MSY). This marks Sixt's inaugural location in Louisiana and boosts its footprint to 51 U.S. airports and over 100 sites in 26 states. Customers can now book car rentals through SIXT.com or the SIXT app. The new branch is conveniently located within the airport premises, offering enhanced accessibility for travelers.

news.headline: Insmed reports ARIKAYCE revenues of $363.7M in 2024, exceeding projections, with 2025 revenues expected at $405-425M.
news.summary: The sales of ARIKAYCE® (amikacin liposome inhalation suspension) for the full year of 2024 have surpassed expectations, with total global revenues reaching around $363.7 million. For the upcoming year 2025, it is anticipated that global revenues for ARIKAYCE will range between $405 million and $425 million, indicating ongoing growth and success for the product.

news.headline: XPPen releases Artist Pro 22 (Gen 2): 22" drawing display with 2.5K resolution. Los Angeles, Jan. 10, 2025.
news.summary: In Los Angeles on January 10, 2025, XPPen unveiled the latest addition to its professional digital drawing display collection: the Artist Pro 22 (Gen 2). This cutting-edge 22-inch drawing display sets a new standard for performance and is positioned as the top choice for artists seeking superior functionality.

news.headline: HOPE Therapeutics™ and NRx Pharmaceuticals hold investor workshop at Mar-A-Lago Club.
news.summary: A medical and technology-driven company, HOPE Therapeutics™, Inc., a wholly-owned subsidiary of NRx Pharmaceuticals, Inc., held an investor workshop. NRx Pharmaceuticals, Inc. is listed as NRx on Nasdaq with the ticker symbol NRXP. The workshop took place in Miami on Jan. 10, 2025.

news.headline: Avantor (NYSE: AVTR) to report Q4 and full year 2024 earnings on Feb 7, 2025. Leading provider in life sciences.
news.summary: In Radnor, Pennsylvania, on January 10, 2025, Avantor, Inc. (NYSE: AVTR), a prominent worldwide supplier of essential products and services to clients in the life sciences and advanced technology sectors, disclosed plans to unveil its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024.

news.headline: Chemify in Scotland appoints Dr. Alastair Leighton, biopharma expert, as COO.
news.summary: Chemify, a company based in Glasgow, Scotland, has announced the appointment of Dr. Alastair Leighton as its new Chief Operating Officer. Dr. Leighton, a seasoned professional in the biopharmaceutical industry, brings a wealth of experience to his new role. This strategic move is expected to further drive Chemify's growth and development.

news.headline: Global AI in Tourism Market projected to reach $13.38 billion by 2030, growing at 28.7% CAGR. Key players: Snowflake, IBM, NVIDIA. By offering, solutions segment expected to dominate market. High initial costs a restraint. Opportunities for better customer interaction using AI.
news.summary: The global AI in Tourism Market is set to see significant growth, with a projected increase from USD 2.95 billion in 2024 to USD 13.38 billion by 2030 at a CAGR of 28.7%. The market dynamics show a rising adoption of data automation tools and a demand for personalized services, with key players such as Snowflake, IBM, and NVIDIA leading the industry. AI integration in sectors has accelerated with advances in machine learning and natural language processing, making deployment of AI solutions easier. The solutions segment, including tools for booking management, virtual assistants, pricing optimization, and travel itinerary planners, is expected to drive market growth during the forecast period. This information was released in a new research report by MarketsandMarkets™, accessible on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: US recently laid to rest confidence with ex-President Carter.
Axogen reports $49.4M Q4 revenue (up 15.1% from 2023) & $187.3M full-year 2024 revenue (up 17.8%). Cash estimated at $39.5M. CEO pleased with growth. Investor Day on Mar 4, 2025.
news.summary: Axogen, Inc. announced preliminary unaudited fourth quarter and full-year 2024 financials. Their fourth quarter revenue is expected to be $49.4 million, a 15.1% increase over the same period in 2023. Full-year 2024 revenue is projected to be $187.3 million, up 17.8% from 2023. The gross margin for the year is expected to be above 75.5%. Their total cash, cash equivalents, and investments on December 31, 2024, are estimated at $39.5 million, a $2.5 million increase from the previous year. The President and CEO, Michael Dale, expressed satisfaction with the company’s performance and announced an upcoming Investor Day on March 4th, 2025, to share strategic priorities. Further details will be disclosed with the release of full audited results for the fourth quarter and year ended December 31, 2024. Axogen is known for developing surgical solutions for peripheral nerve injuries.

news.headline: Diakonos Oncology will present at Biotech Showcase 2025, featuring proprietary tech for late-stage cancers.
news.summary: On January 10, 2025, in Houston, Diakonos Oncology, a clinical-stage biotech firm utilizing unique dendritic cell technology to tackle urgent needs in late-stage and aggressive cancers, shared plans to showcase its recent progress.

news.headline: Verismo Therapeutics doses first patient in Phase 1 trial of SynKIR™-310 for B cell Non-Hodgkin Lymphomas.
news.summary: Verismo Therapeutics, a clinical-stage CAR T company, has administered the initial dose to the first patient in their Phase 1 trial assessing SynKIR™-310, a promising new drug candidate targeted towards individuals with relapsed/refractory B cell Non-Hodgkin Lymphomas. This significant milestone was reached on January 10, 2025, in Philadelphia. Verismo Therapeutics specializes in developing innovative KIR-CAR therapies, with this trial indicating a promising advancement in the field.

news.headline: FDA clears Tyra Biosciences for Phase 2 study of TYRA-300 in Non-Muscle Invasive Bladder Cancer, expects first patient in Q2 2025.
news.summary: Tyra Biosciences, Inc. has named urologic oncologist Erik Goluboff, M.D. as Senior Vice President of Clinical Development to oversee non-muscle invasive bladder cancer (NMIBC) initiatives. The company anticipates the first patient to receive treatment in the SURF302 trial in the second quarter of 2025. Based in Carlsbad, California, Tyra Biosciences is a clinical-stage biotechnology firm listed on the Nasdaq under the symbol TYRA.

news.headline: BofA's Consumer Investments hit $500B in assets, nearly 4M accounts with high-tech solutions and thousands of advisors.
news.summary: Bank of America's Consumer Investments business, based in Charlotte, N.C., has expanded to over $500 million. The platform, which provides access to numerous advisors, is aiding nearly 4 million investors in achieving their financial objectives. The innovative investing services offered by the bank have proven to be beneficial for a large number of account holders.

news.headline: Diamond Lake Minerals (OTC: DLMI) buys Solutions™ Naturopathic & SoftWave Acupuncture Clinics in Arizona for nationwide expansion.
news.summary: Diamond Lake Minerals, Inc. (OTC: DLMI) has successfully completed the acquisition of the prestigious Solutions™ Naturopathic & SoftWave Acupuncture Clinics located in Arizona. This acquisition marks a significant move for Diamond Lake Minerals, Inc. as it expands its portfolio in the healthcare sector. The acquisition includes multiple clinics with a notable track record of offering high-quality naturopathic and acupuncture services. The transaction is expected to enhance Diamond Lake Minerals, Inc.'s presence in the healthcare market and boost its revenue streams.

news.headline: Only 11% of polyamorous individuals find media representations accurate, according to 3Fun survey.
news.summary: In a recent survey conducted by the popular dating app 3Fun, it was found that a mere 11% of polyamorous individuals believe that media representations accurately reflect their actual experiences. This statistic underscores the disconnect between how polyamory is depicted in the media and the reality faced by those living this lifestyle. The survey sheds light on the challenges faced by this community in terms of representation and acceptance.

news.headline: Psylo rebrands as Xylo Bio, with key board appointments. Announces breakthrough progress at JPM Healthcare Conference. Jan. 10, 2025.
news.summary: Xylo Bio, a prominent player in neurotherapeutics discovery and development, revealed significant achievements during the JPM Healthcare Conference in San Francisco on January 10, 2025. Formerly known as Psylo, the company announced its rebranding to Xylo Bio to signal its expanded focus and progress in the field. This change signifies a strategic shift for the organization as it continues to advance in its sector.

news.headline: Trumid reports December 2024 trading highlights, with significant growth in trade volume and user participation.
news.summary: Financial technology company Trumid, a major player in electronic bond trading, recently disclosed its monthly activity and key achievements for the year-end in a press release dated January 10, 2025. During the period under review, the platform experienced significant trade volume, with a total of [insert number] trades executed. Additionally, user participation levels were robust, with a notable [insert number] active users engaged on the platform. The company's performance in the electronic bond trading sector exemplifies its strong market presence and growing traction among investors and traders.

news.headline: ESA achieves key milestones in Virginia's community solar market by 2024, marking impactful growth in Dominion Energy's service territory.
news.summary: Maitland, Florida - On January 10, 2025, ESA, a prominent developer in solar and energy storage, looks back with pride on a successful year in Virginia's active community solar market. The company achieved significant milestones and made a notable impact by creating financeable projects in Dominion Energy's service area.

news.headline: Johnson & Johnson MedTech receives CE Mark approval for Dual Energy THERMOCOOL SMARTTOUCH™ SF Catheter.
news.summary: The Dual Energy THERMOCOOL SMARTTOUCH™ SF Catheter provides electrophysiologists with a unique feature allowing them to alternate between radiofrequency and pulsed field energy using a single catheter. This capability is supported by the CE Mark and findings from the SmartfIRE study conducted on the catheter. The study demonstrated the efficacy and safety of the Dual Energy THERMOCOOL SMARTTOUCH™ SF Catheter in delivering both types of energy during procedures.

news.headline: Bank of Montreal (TSX: BMO) (NYSE: BMO) sets up ASPP for efficient purchase of Common Shares with broker.
news.summary: Today in Toronto, on January 10, 2025, Bank of Montreal (TSX: BMO) (NYSE: BMO) revealed its initiation of an automatic securities purchase plan ("ASPP") with its broker, BMO Nesbitt Burns Inc. This move aims to streamline the process of repurchasing BMO common shares ("Common Shares"). This decision signifies the bank's proactive approach to enhancing shareholder value through strategic investments. The ASPP, once enacted, will allow Bank of Montreal to acquire a specified number of its own outstanding Common Shares at prevailing market prices through its broker. This calculated move underscores the bank's commitment to bolstering its position in the market and leveraging opportunities for growth.

news.headline: FDA clears CapsoVision's CapsoCam Plus® system for pediatric use, providing gentle, stress-free capsule endoscopy for young patients.
news.summary: A new capsule endoscopy system offering 360° panoramic imaging without any wearable equipment is now accessible for pediatric patients. This system, introduced in SARATOGA, Calif., on January 10, 2025, provides a more gentle and stress-free alternative to standard capsule endoscopy procedures.

news.headline: Barington Capital Group submits proxy statement for Matthews Int'l's 2025 annual meeting, advocating for change due to underperformance and ineffective leadership.
news.summary: A letter has been sent to shareholders detailing Barington Capital's strategy to enhance long-term value creation at Matthews. The plan includes four steps aimed at addressing the company's history of underperforming share prices, inadequate operational execution, poor capital allocation, and excessive spending. Emphasizing the necessity for new directors and a new CEO, the letter stresses the urgency of implementing changes to improve performance.

news.headline: KORE wins award for connected vehicle innovation in 2025 IoT Breakthrough Awards Program - global IoT leader.
news.summary: Esteemed IoT Breakthrough Awards Program has acknowledged outstanding companies and products in the Internet-of-Things industry. The event took place in Atlanta on Jan. 10, 2025. KORE, a renowned global IoT Solutions leader and pioneer in IoT hyperscaling, earned recognition as a top provider of IoT Connectivity and Solutions.

news.headline: Wealth Enhancement acquires Danison & Associates, adding $82 million in assets, bringing total to over $103 billion.
news.summary: Wealth Enhancement has expanded into Ohio with their fourth location, now boasting a total of over $103 billion in client assets. This move was announced on January 10, 2025, by the Minneapolis-based national independent wealth management firm.
